steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content:
Line $k$ is
$$y=7x+3$$
Its slope is $7$. A line parallel to it must also have slope $7$.

steps.title: Use the intercept point
steps.content:
Line $j$ passes through $(0,8)$, so its $y$-intercept is $8$. Therefore, line $j$ is
$$y=7x+8$$
The answer is A.
